# dvls_entry_credential_secret (Data Source)

A DVLS Secret Credential Entry

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Lookup by ID
data "dvls_entry_credential_secret" "by_id" {
  vault_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  id       = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
}

# Lookup by name
data "dvls_entry_credential_secret" "by_name" {
  vault_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  name     = "foo"
}

# Lookup by name in a specific folder
data "dvls_entry_credential_secret" "by_name_in_folder" {
  vault_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  name     = "foo"
  folder   = "foo\\bar"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `vault_id` (String) The ID of the vault.

### Optional

- `folder` (String) The folder path to search in. Returns entries in the specified folder and all sub-folders.
- `id` (String) The ID of the entry.
- `name` (String) The name of the entry.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the entry.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) The entry credential secret.
- `tags` (List of String) A list of tags added to the entry.
